scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && bash scripts/prepare-backend.sh && npm run build -w packages/electron && npm run package -w packages/electron
